name: Chicken in Spicy Brown Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Dash in cloves, nutmeg, and ground allspice.
2. Pound chicken to 1/2 inch thick. Lightly brown in oil in a large skillet, about 2 minutes on each side; drain off fat.
3. Combine remaining ingredients; mix well.
4. Pour over chicken in skillet.
5. Bring to boil. Reduce heat; cover and simmer gently for 10 minutes.
6. Remove chicken to serving platter; keep warm.
7. Cook and stir sauce until slightly thickened, about 3 to 5 minutes.
8. Spoon sauce over chicken.
Makes 6 servings.
